However, the "limestone-rich rocky shoulders" and "rustic wooden fence posts" combined with "Gen 3 camera" are frequently cited as strong markers for rural Costa Rica (specifically the Central Valley or Caribbean slopes). The Botanics agent specifically mentions "high-humidity secondary forest" and "broad-leaf evergreen," which leans slightly more towards the humid Caribbean slopes of Costa Rica than the drier parts of Panama or the Yucatán.
